name: chr16p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 16 p-arm pericentric flank (16p11.1-16p11.2), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr16 centromere. Distally adjoins the high-density 16p11.2 SD-mediated recurrent CNV region (autism / schizophrenia). Alpha-satellite (D16Z2), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat patches + pericentromeric SD shoreline; distally adjoins the 16p11.2 BP1-BP5 SD-mediated recurrent CNV region.
